title: Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers' Choice Awards
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The wait is over, and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The wait is over, and we are thrilled to introduce the very first annual Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers’ Choice Awards.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The wait is over, and we are thrilled to introduce the very first annual Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers’ Choice Awards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the roaring success of our sister publication’s Best of George project in 2023, it is now Graaff-Reinet’s time to shine and you, our loyal readers, have nominated your favourite businesses in and around this beautiful Karoo town.","html":"Following the roaring success of our sister publication’s Best of George project in 2023, it is now Graaff-Reinet’s time to shine and you, our loyal readers, have nominated your favourite businesses in and around this beautiful Karoo town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Best of Graaff-Reinet aims to celebrate the very best of our region, from shopping and outdoor activities, to restaurants and professional services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More than 1 150 nominations for over 200 businesses were received, and a 2024 winner will be crowned in each of the 55 categories. Your nominations and keen participation clearly show that our community is all about celebrating excellence. So, let’s get voting and put the very best of Graaff-Reinet in the spotlight!","html":"More than 1 150 nominations for over 200 businesses were received, and a 2024 winner will be crowned in each of the 55 categories. Your nominations and keen participation clearly show that our community is all about celebrating excellence. So, let’s get voting and put the very best of Graaff-Reinet in the spotlight!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Congratulations to each 2024 nominee!","html":"Congratulations to each 2024 nominee!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voting is now open at www.bestofgraaffreinet.com.","html":"Voting is now open at www.bestofgraaffreinet.com."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each vote rewards a company for going the extra mile and upholding the good name of our unique town, so please be honest in your assessment and ensure that a worthy winner emerges in each category.","html":"Each vote rewards a company for going the extra mile and upholding the good name of our unique town, so please be honest in your assessment and ensure that a worthy winner emerges in each category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voting closes 25 July 2024.","html":"Voting closes 25 July 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers' Choice Awards
